title: NoAutoPickup
description: Disables picking-up items on the ground automatically and decide when to.
body:
# **About** [NoAutoPickup](https://modrinth.com/project/noautopickup) is a plugin that disables automatic picking-up items on the ground. No more annoying junk items that you accidentally picking-up!
![Enabled](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a320940427b4f1ed4213e62e40a06b2a48740fb0.png)
### Features - Allow players to choose between automatically picking-up items on the ground or manually by crouching. - Configurable messages. - Lightweight.
### Commands | Command | Description | Default | | -------------- |--------------| ------------- | | `/noautopickup` | Toggles between enabling and disabling NoAutoPickup | `true` | | `/noautopickup reload` | Reloads the configuration file. | `op` | | Command aliases| **nap** |
### Permissions | Node | Description | | -------------- |--------------| | `noautopickup.use` | Allows players to use the `/noautopickup` command | | `noautopickup.admin` | Allows you to use `/noautopickup reload` command to reload the configuration file |
